retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and SOC PDFs. Normalize before shipping to UI.

notes: Jan-Jun 2026 current-account and saving-account KFS pages list Classic UnionPay annual fee at PKR 2,500.
Jan-Jun 2026 current-account KFS also shows PKR 100 to open and NIL balance to keep across the ordinary PKR current-account variants surfaced publicly in this pass.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waived if PKR 100,000 maintained for 3 consecutive months

notes: Jan-Jun 2026 KFS pages list UnionPay Gold annual fee at PKR 3,500.
The retained PKR 100,000 balance threshold comes from the official Jan-Jun 2025 SOC; current KFS pages do not restate a numeric Gold balance requirement.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waived if PKR 100,000 maintained for 3 consecutive months

notes: Jan-Jun 2026 KFS pages list Platinum MasterCard annual fee at PKR 10,000.
The retained PKR 100,000 balance threshold comes from the official Jan-Jun 2025 SOC; current KFS pages do not restate a numeric Platinum balance requirement.
Jan-Jun 2026 current-account and saving-account KFS pages list PayPak Standard annual fee at PKR 2,200.
Jan-Jun 2026 current-account KFS also shows PKR 100 to open and NIL balance to keep across the ordinary PKR current-account variants surfaced publicly in this pass.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waived if PKR 100,000 maintained for 3 consecutive months

notes: Jan-Jun 2026 saving-account KFS lists Gold MasterCard annual fee at PKR 4,500.
The retained balance requirement comes from the official Jan-Jun 2025 SOC; the current KFS does not restate a numeric Gold balance threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Waiver available for specific savings account holders

notes: Jan-Jun 2026 saving-account KFS labels the product slot as Classic MasterCard and lists PKR 3,200 annual fee.
The retained PKR 10,000 balance and waiver note come from older official public material; the current KFS does not restate a silver-tier balance rule.
Jan-Jun 2026 saving-account KFS labels the active fee row as Classic Union Pay Int. and lists PKR 2,500 annual fee.
The pilot record keeps the older Silver naming, but the current public KFS uses Classic rather than Silver terminology.
Jan-Jun 2026 KFS pages list PayPak NexGen annual fee at PKR 2,200.
Current-account KFS shows PKR 100 opening amount and NIL balance to keep for the public PKR current-account variants surfaced in this pass.

gaps: No public consumer credit-card catalogue was found in this pass.
Public debit-card sources did not expose clear salary, age, or account-balance eligibility thresholds.
SOC values changed across periods, so effective period must be preserved in normalization.
